# Latest Draft Cycle (auto-generated)

This file is overwritten automatically by `run_draft_cycle.sh`.
Until a draft cycle is configured and run, treat this file as a disabled status marker rather than a live restart surface.

- Draft cycle state: optional / not configured
- Latest tag: (no draft cycle has run yet)
- Status: not configured
- Run directory: (no draft cycle has run yet)
- Activation note: enable and run a draft cycle before treating this file as a live restart surface.
- Expected per-run outputs (under `team/runs/<tag>/...`):
  - `<tag>_draft_packet.md`
  - `<tag>_draft_preflight.md` + `<tag>_draft_structure.json`
  - `<tag>_draft_member_a.md` / `<tag>_draft_member_b.md` / `<tag>_draft_member_c_leader.md`
  - `<tag>_draft_convergence_log.md` + `<tag>_draft_converged_summary.md` (when convergence gate is enabled)
- Trajectory index: [trajectory_index.json](trajectory_index.json)
